documents.label: Response to Contempt Petition
documents.author: respondent
documents.rationale: Response addresses contempt allegations directly with specific facts, exhibits, and legal citations. Some contradictions between claimed payments and alleged violations. Moderate boilerplate legal language mixed with case-specific detail.

documents.label: Fee Waiver Application
documents.author: respondent
documents.rationale: Document states purpose (fee waiver) and delivers it. Includes detailed financial disclosure. Adds strategic guidance beyond form scope.

documents.label: Motion to Modify Purge
documents.author: respondent
documents.rationale: Motion seeks to modify purge as titled. Detailed financial showing; some circularity (assets sufficient yet insufficient). Verbose but substantive.

documents.label: Motion for Findings
documents.author: respondent
documents.rationale: Motion seeks required constitutional findings before sanctions. Document directly supports stated purpose with detailed evidence, legal authority, and specific relief. Minor contradictions in asset/debt figures; some verbosity in asymmetry section.

documents.label: Document Production (861 files)
documents.author: respondent
documents.rationale: Bank statement, not legal/government document. Scores reflect it as financial disclosure: clear, minimal deflection, standard template.

documents.label: Motion re: Statutory Definition
documents.author: respondent
documents.rationale: Motion states purpose clearly; extensive documentation supports claims. Verbose but substantive. Some internal tensions (credit score recovery vs. retardation narrative).

documents.label: Certificate of Service
documents.author: respondent
documents.rationale: Document does exactly what titled: certifies service of documents. Straightforward, factual, minimal boilerplate.

documents.label: Discovery Requests (Rule 214)
documents.author: respondent
documents.rationale: Notice of filing/service document. Accomplishes stated purpose (notifying of discovery request filing). Mostly boilerplate court notice with minimal deflection.

documents.label: Motion for Constitutional Findings
documents.author: respondent
documents.rationale: Motion clearly states purpose (require constitutional findings before sanctions) and pursues that relief directly. Well-documented, specific, minimal boilerplate. No deflection.

documents.label: Supplemental Brief
documents.author: respondent
documents.rationale: Brief directly supports stated purpose: compel disclosure, strike affidavit, defer contempt. Logical chain clear. Minimal boilerplate. No deflection.

documents.label: Direct Email (Settlement Offer)
documents.author: respondent
documents.rationale: Settlement demand masquerades as neutral disclosure but weaponizes detailed allegations to coerce acceptance. Stated purpose (settlement) contradicted by threat architecture.

documents.label: Motion for Sanctions
documents.author: respondent
documents.rationale: Motion states purpose clearly and pursues it directly. Specific factual allegations with exhibits. Minimal boilerplate. No deflection or contradiction detected.

documents.label: Petition for Contempt (1st)
documents.author: petitioner_counsel
documents.rationale: Petition states purpose clearly and presents evidence supporting contempt claim. However, petitioner's own prior contempt finding and mental health crisis undermine credibility of relief sought.

documents.label: Motion for Employment Diary
documents.author: petitioner_counsel
documents.rationale: Email chain about motion; client disputes income claims but doesn't directly address motion's stated purpose. Contradicts own financial narrative.

documents.label: Proposed Order (Scheduling)
documents.author: petitioner_counsel
documents.rationale: Proposed order clearly schedules trial and discovery. Minor passive voice in preamble. Mostly boilerplate court language. No contradictions or deflection.

documents.label: Petition for Contempt (2nd)
documents.author: petitioner_counsel
documents.rationale: Petition seeks contempt finding but contains major date contradictions (April 2025 order, May 2026 contempt finding, August 2025 violation). Asymmetry argument undermined by petitioner's own admitted violations.

documents.label: Objection to Production Scope
documents.author: petitioner_counsel
documents.rationale: Document produces promised discovery but embeds narrative complaints, employment justifications, and accusations against opposing party within discovery cover letter.

documents.label: Response to Statutory Motion
documents.author: petitioner_counsel
documents.rationale: Document is litigation prep, not official response. Admits wrongdoing but strategically pivots to deflect. Contradicts 'full responsibility' with immediate blame-shifting instructions.

documents.label: Petition for Contempt (3rd)
documents.author: petitioner_counsel
documents.rationale: Petition clearly states purpose and supports claims with specific dates, amounts, orders violated. Straightforward contempt filing.

documents.label: Proposed Denial Order
documents.author: petitioner_counsel
documents.rationale: Court order executes stated purpose (grant/deny relief). Verbose preamble. References separate contempt order without details. Some passive construction. Minor timeline inconsistencies. Mixed boilerplate/specific language.

documents.label: Motion to Strike
documents.author: petitioner_counsel
documents.rationale: Motion clearly states purpose (strike affidavit) and supports with specific allegations. Detailed but justified. No deflection or contradictions detected.

documents.label: Email: Scheduling Only
documents.author: petitioner_counsel
documents.rationale: Email does exactly what title says: requests deposition scheduling. Clear, direct, minimal obfuscation. Not a government document.

documents.label: Email: 'Nothing Attached'
documents.author: petitioner_counsel
documents.rationale: Pro se litigant email. States purpose (address characterization of transfers) and does so directly. No deflection, no boilerplate, no exemptions claimed.

documents.label: Email: Deposition Scheduling
documents.author: petitioner_counsel
documents.rationale: Straightforward scheduling request. States purpose clearly, delivers relevant case/deposition details, no deflection or contradiction.

documents.label: Financial Disclosure Affidavit (Original)
documents.author: petitioner
documents.rationale: Email forwarding request for affidavit completion. Document itself is transmittal, not disclosure. Attachment unreviewed.

documents.label: Corrected Financial Affidavit
documents.author: petitioner
documents.rationale: Document discloses comprehensively but contains major contradictions: $0 income vs. $6,310 monthly expenses funded from depleting reserves; $458k net worth vs. imminent insolvency; claims inability to pay mortgage yet made $110k+ transfers to ex-spouse.

documents.label: Order on Contempt
documents.author: court
documents.rationale: Court order on contempt does what title says. Highly repetitive template structure across counts. Minimal deflection or contradiction.

documents.label: Allocation Judgment
documents.author: court
documents.rationale: Joint allocation judgment executes stated purpose. Verbose boilerplate. JOEL's parenting time 'reserved'—vague deflection. Internal tension: shared responsibility vs. HEATHER sole decision-maker.

documents.label: Status Order
documents.author: court
documents.rationale: Standard court order accomplishing stated purpose. Boilerplate language, passive judicial voice, minimal contradiction.

documents.label: Ruling on Discovery
documents.author: court
documents.rationale: Ruling denies motions as stated. Minimal explanation for denial. Mostly boilerplate court language.

documents.label: FOIA Response (Initial Denial)
documents.author: government
documents.rationale: This is a FOIA REQUEST, not a denial. Document clearly states purpose and specific records sought. No obfuscation detected.

documents.label: Child Support Agency Response
documents.author: government
documents.rationale: Document analyzes agency response, not the response itself. Highly verbose analysis with minimal boilerplate. No contradictions. Clear attribution.

documents.label: FOIA Referral (Circular)
documents.author: government
documents.rationale: This is a FOIA REQUEST, not a FOIA response. Document clearly states purpose and makes specific, detailed requests. No deflection detected.

documents.label: Regulatory Correction Notice
documents.author: government
documents.rationale: Standard notice of motion. Does exactly what title states. Minimal obfuscation; mostly boilerplate court form.
